{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032204231199E08D7DCEAD0C7A79C0"}"},"total":2628},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7133900069933925127","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"书开头不怎么吸引人，若不是闹书荒忍住了差点就错过，书后面不错，笑点多，很有意思，让人眼前一亮，加油加油加油哦[害羞][害羞][害羞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1660990644,"group_id":"7125304136609827878","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"人生如戏，全靠演绎，每个故事都能对应现实中的某个你","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6xlV9DUklOU9mt1bRIXomU=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9053507864144d5591ebe753be8a97d5~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706865&x-signature=URmfNQinV%2Fa%2Fj9fpfsz9hYFxPe4%3D","user_id":"110853149723","user_name":"墨文玉"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110853149723","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":0,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7125304136609827878","book_info":{"abstract":"【搞笑+无女主+老六】
张浩穿越到洪荒，成为一个三清还未成圣时期的普通人族；
当遇见正在游历人族的老子后，觉醒了可以同步他人、以及复制他人灵宝的金手指：大道空间；
从此，张浩在老六的道路越走越远；
封神量劫时：
元始天尊：太上老子，你欺人太甚，居然偷袭我，我大意了，没有躲！
准提：“太上老子，不当人子，明明说好了，一起干通天，你居然背刺我~”
接引顶着一头包，道：“太上师兄，过了，你这样，就没意思了~”
太上老子看了看自己的八景宫，迷茫了：
‘我出去过吗？应该，出去过吧~’
鸿钧：“天道，这个洪荒，有亿点乱啊~”
天道：“别喊我，我不知道，我不在，老六出没洪荒，忒危险了，大道喊我回家吃饭~”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eec51d8fe75635e50293dd3c69829bd1","author":"大肉包子","author_id":"","book_id":"7125304136609827878","book_name":"洪荒：老六的快乐你想不到","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7125383675663647269","read_count"
